div.p: Component: Coroutine Runtime / Synchronization Primitive Memory Model: SeqCst (Atomic Operations)

g.title: Acquire spinlock or mutex on the internal ring buffer
Check atomic counter for active senders
Capture current Coroutine context and Waker
Append waker to the wait-list queue

ul.li: Lock Ordering: Mutex must be released before the coroutine suspends in Step_7 to prevent deadlock.
Spurious Wakeups: The algorithm loops back to Step_1 after resumption because another consumer might have stolen the data during the transition from RUNNABLE to RUNNING.
sender_count: Uses Relaxed ordering for the check, but Acquire when determining channel closure.
